items.title: Wire BY SaaS URL into Playwright OA tests
items.notes: Tests currently hardcoded to local (cx-lpt943). Need to support SaaS base URL via env config — auth.js already has the IS_LOCAL flag and SaaS URL logic, just needs the playwright-run.json env toggle wired up and tested against the SaaS environment.
